specFidelityNotes: Diff c1c4af7..2853c15 (#469). catalog_partition.py implements A-2 search_all-only catalog bucket with ACTIVATE active allowlist, trailing-7-day New for DAILY strategy, explicit CatalogCountStrategy.POINT_IN_TIME fallback (New since BACKFILL_WINDOW_START 2026-03-16, grain catalog_point_in_time), persistence of active_products/new_products via AnalyticsPerformanceRepo, and partition progress skip/complete/failed via AnalyticsBackfillPartitionsRepo bucket catalog. MODULE.md documents strategies and A-2 limitation. Nine pytest cases with fixture; no A-3 fan-out; no live Partner. Matches issue #469 and ADR-029 catalog slice intent.

convention_notes.note: Catalog partition API, strategies, and partition contract documented alongside budget governor.
Uses AnalyticsBackfillPartitionsRepo and AnalyticsPerformanceRepo consistently with sibling partition modules.
